step_rationale: Polyunsaturated eicosatrienoic acid; downregulated post-MI metabolite.
mechanism: 8,11,14-eicosatrienoic acid reduction post-myocardial infarction reflects disrupted polyunsaturated fatty acid metabolism and ischemic metabolic remodeling.

references.title: Nicotinamide riboside kinase-2 regulates metabolic adaptation in the ischemic heart.
